message.content: @startuml title PD parse detail skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { LifeLineBorderColor #999999 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ParticipantBorderColor #666666 ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F7 BoxBorderColor #666666 BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ArrowColor #333333 ActorBorderColor #666666 ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB NoteBorderColor #999999 } participant "Chi" as Chi participant "pipeline" as pipeline participant "pdlibwrapper\ncamxpdlibwrapper.cpp" as pdlibwrapper participant "pdlibinterface\ncamxpdlibinterface.cpp" as pdlibinterface participant "camxsensornode.cpp" as sensornode participant "camxpdlibraryhandler.cpp" as pdlibraryhandler == chi stats algo == note left of Chi ChiPDEntry[] = "ChiPDLibraryEntry" ChiASDEntry[] = "ChiASDAlgorithmEntry" ChiAFDEntry[] = "ChiAFDAlgorithmEntry" ChiAWBEntry[] = "ChiAWBAlgorithmEntry" ChiAFEntry[] = "ChiAFAlgorithmEntry" from this text, can get Algorithm Entry end note == PD lib create == pipeline -> Chi : ProbeChiComponents activate Chi Chi -> Chi : GetAEAlgorithmCallback Chi -> Chi : GetAFDAlgorithmCallback Chi -> Chi : GetAFAlgorithmCallback Chi -> Chi : GetAWBAlgorithmCallback Chi -> Chi : GetASDAlgorithmCallback Chi -> Chi : GetPDLibraryCallback Chi -> Chi : GetHVXAlgorithmCallback Chi --> pipeline : return deactivate Chi note left of Chi These Callback used in camxpipeline.cpp when call pipeline:CreateNodes end note note left of Chi for m_pStatscallback.pPDCallback contain these interface pCallbacks->pfnGetCapabilities = PDWrapperGetCapabilities; pCallbacks->pfnCreate = CreatePDLibWrapper; pCallbacks->pfnQueryVendorTag = NULL; pCallbacks->pfnSetAlgoInterface = PDWrapperSetNodeInterface; end note pipeline -> pdlibwrapper : CreatePDLibWrapper activate pdlibwrapper pdlibwrapper -> pdlibwrapper : CamX::LoadPDLib note right of pdlibwrapper "%s%s%s.%s" "VendorLibPath" "PathSeparator" "pLibName" "SharedLibraryExtension" end note pdlibwrapper --> pdlibwrapper : return Addr pdlibwrapper -> pdlibraryhandler : pfnCreate pdlibwrapper <-- pdlibraryhandler : return deactivate pdlibwrapper == call PD lib == note right of pdlibwrapper in dir: 1. camx-lib-3a/system/statsalgo/pdlib 2. camx-lib/system/statsalgo/pdlibsony both have camxpdlibinterface.cpp end note == Init PDLib == note left of pipeline for pipeline create, will create every node and pdlib is init in sensor node end note pipeline -> sensornode : ProcessingNodeFinalizeInitialization activate sensornode note left of sensornode 1. ReadEEPROMData 2. GetCSInfo 3. GetOTPData 4. PopulatePDAFInformation 5. PublishPDAFInformation why we need publish this info? actually for PropertyIDSensorPDAFInfo, in IFE PDPCv1.1 and BPS PDPC2.0 will use it. since type 3 sensor will not do pdpc end note sensornode -> sensornode : LoadPDLibrary sensornode -> pdlibraryhandler : CPDLibHandler::CreateLib deactivate sensornode @enduml
